item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: Know your spots
item.description:
Similar solution to different environments from similar, but still distinct evolutionary branches. Cats coloration and patters are excellent camoflauge
Tigers look orange to humans because we are trichromats, but to deer and boars the same coat appears green since ungulates are dichromats. This visual difference allows the tiger’s orange and black stripes to blend into the jungle, giving it effective camouflage while stalking prey.
item.dc:creator: Kyzyl

26 Man Tax: Max Bennett
"You see, war is not the answer / For only love can conquer hate. / You know we've got to find a way / To bring some lovin' here today." -Marvin Gaye So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. For the couple people that have said I'm "scamming" people, I only get SNAP, so this money goes to things like TP, shampoo, laundry detergent, etc. Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, **Imgur Creator Spotlight is now in your hands!! Having trouble finding people I haven't already featured recently. Now I'm going to just do who YOU nominate. Tag me or DM me and I'll feature whoever you pick.**
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.dc:creator: atadrisque

item.title: Ebony wood handle shaping from start to finish.
item.description:
Most of the basic shaping is done on the belt grinder and with the dremel.
It then gets refined by hand.
Thank you for checking me out. I am a one man knife making operation, so any like or comment is appreciated. If you like this kind of stuff and would like to see more I have a YouTube channel where I post full length build videos https://youtube.com/@helixknives
item.dc:creator: Helixknives

item.title: In China, many unemployed young men become delivery drivers, while young, jobless women turn to live streaming. The drivers spend some of their earnings on virtual gifts for the streamers, who then use the money to order food and cosmetics from them. A vi
item.description: In China, youth unemployment (around 17% for 16-24 year olds) is driving many towards delivery work and live streaming. Virtual gifts from delivery drivers to streamers circulate money within this platform economy, a cycle observed and discussed for several years. The phenomenon is real
item.dc:creator: kayzersosie

item.title: Friday Funky Fantasy Fiesta, ok its rpg but I couldn't let the alliteration go to waste
item.description: EDIT: Friday frontpage! Thank you, Imgurians! I do reviews as a hobby and this week I tackled a new sci-fi game for a change. Pragmata! If you're curious about it, check the link https://youtu.be/zGxfAruU1n4
item.dc:creator: Skullwriter

item.title: Blackfoot People
item.description: For over a millennia, the Blackfoot People lived along side the American Bison until both were forcibly displaced over a century ago. Bison were hunted to near extinction by the U.S. government as a method to starve and control Plains Tribes like the Blackfoot who were being forced off their lands and onto reservations. Bring Them Home follows a small group of Blackfoot who are working to right these historic wrongs by returning wild American Bison to their lands – an act that would heal people, re-enliven traditional culture and bring economic opportunity to their community.
item.dc:creator: LastHippie
